cards.name: Reception Problems
cards.description:
Unplayable.
Whenever this card is drawn, lose 2 Focus this turn.

relics.name: Aggression Protocol
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. While you have an Attack in hand, the first Skill or Power card you play each turn costs [E] more.
relics.flavorText: Prioritization updated: Violence first, questions later.

relics.name: Brass Coil
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. Enemies start combat with 1 Artifact. In single-enemy combats, the enemy gains 2 Artifact instead.
relics.flavorText: A courtesy before the inevitable.

relics.name: Cursed Pentagram
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. Obtain a random Curse for every 5 future non-Curse cards added to your deck.
relics.flavorText: Don't mess with the force you don't understand...

relics.name: Dead Battery
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. You cannot play more than 1 Power card per turn.
relics.flavorText: Press F to pay respects.

relics.name: Energized Coin
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. Whenever you climb a floor, Energized Coin is rerolled to have the negative effect of either Sozu or Ectoplasm.
relics.flavorText: The coin has been tossed.

relics.name: Fading Star
relics.description: at the start of each turn, gain [E] and lose [STAR].
relics.flavorText: The stars fade, but you press on.

relics.name: High Heels
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. At the start of combat, lose 1 Dexterity and shuffle 1 Clumsy into your Draw Pile.
relics.flavorText: Elegant, but not very comfortable for combat.

relics.name: Huge House
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. Upon pickup, lose 1 random potion. Lose 50 Gold. Lower your Max HP by 5. Obtain 1 Strike. Downgrade 1 random card.
relics.flavorText: Is it adequate enough?

relics.name: Magnifying Glass
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. Enemies have 15% more HP.
relics.flavorText: The bigger they are, the harder they fall.

relics.name: Necrotic Scythe
relics.description: The first time each turn you play a card that costs [E][E] or more, gain [E].
relics.flavorText: Heavy swings feel lighter.

relics.name: Never-Ending Sparkler
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. 50% of Question Mark rooms are changed into Elite rooms.
relics.flavorText: It sparks joy.

relics.name: Ogre Head
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. Whenever you play a card that targets an enemy, you have 50% chance to target another enemy.
relics.flavorText: Me smash you! Wait... who?

relics.name: Old TV
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. At the start of combat, shuffle 1 Reception Problems into your Draw Pile.
relics.flavorText: Too old to use, too good to throw away.

relics.name: Pogo Stick
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. The first time each turn you discard a card, shuffle 1 Dazed into your Draw Pile.
relics.flavorText: Boing, boing, boing...

relics.name: Red Rose
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. ALL enemies start combat with 1 Thorns.
relics.flavorText: There is no rose without a thorn.

relics.name: Rotting Skull
relics.description: If your HP is at or below 50%, gain [E] and draw 1 additional card at the start of each turn.
relics.flavorText: Find the other one too! Is this the beginning of a new collection?

relics.name: Royal Coffers
relics.description: If you have at least 300 unspent Gold, gain [E] at the start of each turn.
relics.flavorText: Money doesn't buy happiness. Just energy.

relics.name: Spider Web
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. Each turn, one random Attack in Hand costs [E] more this turn.
relics.flavorText: Use it to catch your enemies, not to catch yourself...

relics.name: Sticky Hand
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. Whenever you would take a card in a card reward, you take ALL the offered cards instead.
relics.flavorText: Definitely going to come in handy.

relics.name: Tabasco Sauce
relics.description: Gain [E] at the start of each turn. Healing effects are reduced by 50%.
relics.flavorText: Ah, that's hot! That is hot!

keywords.name: Reception Problems
keywords.description: Lose Focus until the end of this turn.

mods.name: Energized Spire 2.0
mods.description: This is a content mod that adds a new Ancient with a lot of Energy relics!
